leadText: If you were looking for the mechanic in Pokémon Pinball and Pokémon Pinball: Ruby & Sapphire, see Ball Upgrade. The Upgrade (Japanese: アップグレード Upgrade), formatted as Up-Grade prior to Pokémon Sword and Shield, is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It allows Porygon to evolve into Porygon2.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Porygon to evolve into Porygon2 when traded while holding it, which consumes the Upgrade. Porygon will not evolve if linking to a Generation I game. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Upgrade simply needs to be used on Porygon to trigger the Evolution, which consumes the item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Upgrade at Luminous Cave or Luminous Spring , Porygon can be evolved into Porygon2 . This consumes the Link Cable and Upgrade. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B It enables a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve. Give it to the Pokémon when it's ready to evolve. MD T D S A mysterious device filled with all sorts of data. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
